summary: The diff addresses both REQ-19 (backend Motoko fixes) and REQ-20 (frontend TypeScript fixes). For REQ-20, the frontend changes are well-evidenced: productId references removed, hook renames fixed, React Query types corrected, and components updated. However, there is no evidence in the diff of any changes to backend files (backend/main.mo or backend/migration.mo), which are the primary targets of REQ-19.

missing_requirements.requirement: Diagnose and fix all Motoko backend compilation errors in backend/main.mo and backend/migration.mo, including optional productId handling, admin principal check, and mismatched type signatures.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no modifications to backend/main.mo or backend/migration.mo. No backend files appear in the added, modified, or removed file lists. REQ-19 acceptance criteria (backend compiles without errors, canister deploys successfully) cannot be verified from the diff.
